tracks.rawText: 3:12Studio Selectionv4.5-allCoverReggaeton dembow dub with a pounding kick-snare dembow at 95 BPM, sub-bass pulses, plucked synth melody, and heavy pitch-corrected male lead, Dub flavor comes from spring reverb snare throws, tape delay feedback, filtered organ stabs, spacey echo tails, and a wide mix with dropouts, bass hits, and half-time drum accentsPublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection

tracks.rawText: 3:30Cuando No Estás Cerca (Remix) (Remastered)v4.5-allCoverVirtuoso Spanish pop ballad with a professional vocalist attacking high notes, dramatic key changes done cleanly, and a love-song tension that feels menacing, Grand piano, low string ostinato, tense synth pads, sub-bass pulses, muted toms, cinematic reverb tails, then explosive chorus lifts with layered harmonies and abrupt dynamic turnsPublishRemix
tracks.title: Cuando No Estás Cerca (Remix) (Remastered)

tracks.rawText: 1:48Chrome Eyelashv5.5Phonk drift with distorted cowbell leads, 808 sub-bass slides, chopped Memphis-style vocal stabs, and gritty trap hats, Dark synthwave adds analog Juno pads, arpeggiated pulses, gated snare, and neon-soaked textures, Japanese trap with sharp rimshots, cinematic racing soundtrack tension, and NFSU/Tokyo Drift-style turbo synths1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:12Dhollight Fireworksv5.5High-energy Bhangra, EDM, and Desi Fusion with dhol strikes, tumbi plucks, and shehnai riffs over a four-on-the-floor festival kick, sub-bass drops, snare builds, and bright synth leads, Punjabi percussion fills, sidechained pads, chopped vocal hooks, risers, and punchy compression create a euphoric, dancefloor-ready hybrid1PublishRemix
